message:
test: add 5 new conformance fixtures for pie, mindmap, journey, timeline, gitgraph

Expands conformance test coverage from 10 to 15 diagram types with
fixtures validating parse counts and SVG rendering for additional
diagram types: pie charts, mindmaps, user journeys, timelines, and
git graphs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+gitGraph
+    commit
+    commit
+    branch develop
+    commit
+    commit
+    checkout main
+    merge develop
+    commit

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+journey
+    title My working day
+    section Go to work
+        Make tea: 5: Me
+        Go upstairs: 3: Me
+    section At work
+        Sit down: 5: Me

@@ -0,0 +1,7 @@
+mindmap
+    root((Main Topic))
+        Branch1
+            Leaf1
+            Leaf2
+        Branch2
+            Leaf3

@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+timeline
+    title History of major events
+    2020 : COVID-19 pandemic begins
+    2021 : Vaccines roll out
+    2022 : Pandemic restrictions ease

@@ -346,5 +346,139 @@
         "Testing"
       ]
     }
+  },
+  {
+    "id": "pie_chart",

+    ],

+        "exact_count": 0
+      },
+      "counts": {

+        "edges": 0,
+        "clusters": 0,
+        "subgraphs": 0
+      },
+      "svg_contains": [

+        "Rats"
+      ]

+  },

+      "counts": {

+        "edges": 2,

+      "svg_contains": [
